segments.text: [Speaker Notes] Chapter 25, Opener, Many antibiotics act by inhibiting steps in protein synthesis. There is much criticism of the large-scale administration of antibiotics to livestock, particularly in feedlots. What is the rationale for this use of antibiotics, and what is the basis for criticism of the practice?
